response.justification: The candidate lacks the required 8 years of C++ experience and 5 years of large-scale infrastructure/cloud compute platform experience; their work is primarily in TypeScript, Node.js, and DLang, with only brief, non-leading C++ exposure in early roles, and no evidence of leading cloud compute platforms or mentoring cloud/DevOps engineers as required.
strengths: Strong full-stack versatility with diverse tech exposure
Active open-source contributor and technical educator
Proven experience in distributed systems and DevOps tooling
concerns: No demonstrable 8+ years of C++ programming as required
Lacks documented experience in cloud compute platform leadership
No evidence of mentoring cloud/DevOps engineers or owning large-scale infrastructure projects
